title: Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc Shareholders Approve N86 Delisting Price - FinancialEDGE
description: Shareholders of Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc have approved a delisting price of N86 per share, marking the company's exit from the Nigerian Exchange Limited trading floor. This decision was made at a Court-ordered meeting in Lagos on November 14, 2024. Details later.
html:
Shareholders of Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc have approved a delisting price of N86 per share, marking the company’s exit from the Nigerian Exchange Limited trading floor.

This decision was made at a Court-ordered meeting in Lagos on November 14, 2024.

Details later.
